svg.title: FreightcarchecK — user interaction block diagram
svg.desc: Block diagram showing the user connecting to the FreightcarchecK app, which contains three tabs: Dashboard, Manifest Table, and Train Layout, each with their key functionalities.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Who are the users of FreightcarchecK?')
sendPrompt('What does the Dashboard tab show?')
sendPrompt('What can users do in the Manifest Table tab?')
sendPrompt('What does the Train Layout tab show?')
